title: Down by Law
synopsis:
"It’s a sad and beautiful world."
Framed for crimes they didn't commit, an unemployed DJ and a pimp share a New Orleans prison cell with an eccentric Italian tourist. The mismatched trio miraculously escapes into the labyrinthine Louisiana swamps, navigating the wilderness and their clashing personalities. This “neo-beat noir comedy” marks Jarmusch’s first collaboration with cinematographer Robby Müller, whose high-contrast black-and-white cinematography elevates the outcasts' journey into a visually stylized fairy tale.

synopsis_lang.en:
"It’s a sad and beautiful world."
Framed for crimes they didn't commit, an unemployed DJ and a pimp share a New Orleans prison cell with an eccentric Italian tourist. The mismatched trio miraculously escapes into the labyrinthine Louisiana swamps, navigating the wilderness and their clashing personalities. This “neo-beat noir comedy” marks Jarmusch’s first collaboration with cinematographer Robby Müller, whose high-contrast black-and-white cinematography elevates the outcasts' journey into a visually stylized fairy tale.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
「這是一個悲傷而美麗的世界。」
落魄電台DJ與街頭皮條客雙雙遭人陷害，與一名熱情的意大利遊客被一同關進新奧爾良的一個牢房。在活潑的意大利人帶領下，三個性格迥異的陌生人竟奇蹟越獄，逃入路易斯安那州迷宮般的茂密沼澤地，在荒野中經歷各種荒誕波折。占渣木殊首次與荷蘭攝影師洛比慕勒合作，高反差的黑白攝影為這趟逃亡之旅注入鮮明視覺風格，將這部「新垮掉派黑色喜劇」構築成童話般的影像世界。

cast: Tom Waits, John Lurie, Roberto Benigni
